checklist.description: Create all 7 databases, 17 views, dashboard layout, relations, formulas, and sample data as specified in template-design.md
Create 1280x720 thumbnail image using thumbnail-spec.json and upload to Gumroad listing
Publish product on Gumroad using listing.md content: title, price ($9), description, tags, cover image, and Notion template link
Duplicate the Notion template from a different account to verify all databases, views, relations, formulas, and sample data copy correctly
Queue value_post, promo_post, and thread_post from x-posts.json into the @prodhq27 posting schedule
